title: Ruroc Atlas 4.0 Carbon Gloss Blue

specs.material: Carbon Fiber Composite Shell with ABS Impact Liner

technical_analysis: The Ruroc Atlas 4.0 utilizes a proprietary carbon fiber weave architecture that significantly reduces rotational energy transfer during impact while maintaining structural rigidity. The internal EPS liner is segmented into three distinct zones to optimize energy absorption across different crash vectors, ensuring maximum protection without compromising comfort. Aerodynamic shaping has been refined through computational fluid dynamics (CFD) simulation to minimize drag and reduce wind buffeting at high speeds.
marketing_description: Experience the pinnacle of lightweight performance with the Ruroc Atlas 4.0 in a striking gloss blue finish. Crafted from aerospace-grade carbon fiber, this full-face helmet offers an unparalleled strength-to-weight ratio, making it the ideal choice for track days and spirited street riding where every gram counts.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the Ruroc Atlas 4.0 Carbon Gloss Blue: a lightweight ECE 22.06 certified full-face helmet featuring advanced carbon fiber construction, superior ventilation, and premium fitment for serious riders.
